name: The Credit Report Law Group
description_short: The Credit Report Law Group is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 4.8/5 with 61 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
The Credit Report Law Group is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. Carrying a 4.8/5.0 Google rating from 61 reviews, The Credit Report Law Group has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the New York area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a attorney, The Credit Report Law Group provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. The Credit Report Law Group operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering The Credit Report Law Group should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
